title: Senior AI/ML Developer
company_focus: Neurotechnology software for education and accessibility
description:
At Everway, our goal is to lead the world in Neurotechnology
software, helping transform the way we understand and are
understood.

We’re a global community of over 600 team members spanning
seven countries, including the UK, USA, Norway, Denmark,
Sweden, Australia, and New Zealand. By understanding and
addressing the unique needs of each individual, we're
creating a world where differences are recognized and
valued. A world where everyone can thrive.

We can only achieve our goals and continue to grow by having
high performing people in our team, people who share our
goals and are passionate about our mission. We pride
ourselves on our core values that are embedded within our
culture. These are to be curious, have courage, and commit
fully.

Join us at Everway - together, we can unlock the full
potential of every mind.

About the role

At Everway, we're embedding AI directly into products that
serve 250M+ users in education and accessibility. We're
looking for a Senior AI/ML Developer to join our Product AI
team and play a leading role in delivering production AI
features that make a genuine difference to students,
educators, and learners with diverse needs.

This is a hands-on engineering role. You'll take AI features
from concept through to deployment and monitoring :writing
production-grade code, integrating with our product
codebases, and owning the full lifecycle. We're not looking
for someone who prototypes and hands off; you'll be the
engineer who ships and supports your work in production.

You'll work across multiple LLM providers (OpenAI,
Anthropic, Google, AWS Bedrock) as well as open-source
models, selecting the right approach for each problem.
You'll have the opportunity to build agentic workflows, and
contribute to our evolving AI architecture. You'll
collaborate directly with product and engineering teams to
shape how AI capabilities are integrated across our
portfolio.

We have proprietary data, in-house expertise in linguistics
and accessibility, and ambitious plans for what's next.
You'll join a supportive team where mentorship flows both
ways and where your contributions will directly shape
products used at scale.

Main Responsibilities

- End-to-End Delivery: Own the full lifecycle of AI projects-
  from ideation and data collection to production deployment
  and post-launch evaluation.
- Production Engineering: Write well-designed, efficient, and
  testable code that integrates directly into product
  codebases
- Systems Integration: Implement Model Context Protocol (MCP)
  to connect LLMs with proprietary data sources and internal
  tools securely
- Model Orchestration: Scope and build Generative AI solutions
  using a mixture of SaaS (OpenAI, AWS Bedrock) and Open
  Source solutions.
- Scaling & Monitoring: Work with development, QA, and
  infrastructure teams to scale and monitor AI solutions in
  production

Essential Criteria

- 3+ years of experience  in a production ML/AI engineering
  role.
- Proven experience writing production-grade Python code and
  deploying ML models at scale.
- Ability to work cross-functionally and a track record of
  continuous learning in the rapidly evolving AI space
- Hands-on experience building and deploying applications with
  multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, AWS
  Bedrock)
- Experience with open-source LLMs (e.g., Llama, Mistral)
  including deployment and/or fine-tuning
- Demonstrated ability to take AI features from prototype
  through to production
- Solid software engineering fundamentals - CI/CD, testing,
  containerisation, cloud deployment
- Full lifecycle ML experience: data, training/prompting,
  evaluation, deployment, monitoring

Desirable Criteria

- Experience working in an Agile development environment.
- Experience building evaluation frameworks for LLM
  applications
- Knowledge of AI governance, data protection, and responsible
  AI practices

Please submit your application on our website by Friday 6th
February 2026.

Please note: applications may close early due to high
demand, so early submission is encouraged.

Join our team and enjoy a competitive salary with bonus
opportunities, flexible work schedules, and comprehensive
health and wellness benefits. We offer flexible time off
plans, career growth through development programs, and a
collaborative, innovative culture where your ideas matter.
Ready to make an impact? Apply today and be part of a
company that invests in your success!

We are committed to providing a Drug-Free Workplace for all
employees.

We are an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified
applicants will receive consideration for employment without
regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin,
disability status, protected veteran status or any other
characteristic protected by law.

You can view our Recruitment and Selection Policy here.

Please click the link for our Privacy Notice

ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on AI engineering role that involves
building and deploying Generative AI solutions including
LLMs, agentic workflows, and RAG implementations. The
engineer owns the full lifecycle from concept to production,
working with multiple LLM providers, open-source models, and
implementing Model Context Protocol - all direct work on AI
systems.
